name: Roast Goose with Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the neck and gizzard and place them in a saucepan with about 1 quart of water. Let simmer lightly for several hours while partially covered.
2. Reduce to about 2 cups and season with salt. Mix remaining ingredients, except gravy, together and adjust seasoning by tasting. Stuff, lace, and truss the bird.
3. Roast in a 325°F oven, breast down, for 1½ hours. Draw off fat as it accumulates.
4. Turn and roast another 1½ hours (or longer for a larger bird) until juices run clear when pricked where the thigh attaches to the body.
5. Remove from oven and let rest on a heated serving platter while preparing the gravy.
6. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of the fat and sprinkle with flour. Set over low heat and stir for one minute, scraping up all the brown bits.
7. Add broth and stir until smooth. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve in a boat with goose.
